name: Ino Sakura
description: __Height:__ 155 cm She's a first-year in high school. One of her favorite things is cooking. She's not good at dieting. Raised in the countryside somewhere in Okayama, a prefecture some 350 miles west from Tokyo, Ino had always been surrounded by farm life. Like many children with humble upbringings, she had yearned to become someone big, and after watching Brocco perform on television, Ino knew she wanted to sing and dance just like her. name: Iori Souma
description: __Height:__ 183 cm He is a fifth-year dentistery student at a national university in Tokyo.

name: Kraft
description: He is an elf that Frieren's group meets in a cabin in the mountains. He's a monk and believed to be the last elf alive until meeting Frieren.

name: Kumiko Yamaguchi
description: A university graduate, and a newly hired teacher at Shirokin Gakuen. She is very idealistic, and wants to inspire her students and help them graduate high school. Since the age of 7, when her parents died, Kumiko has been living with her grandfather, who is the head of a yakuza group. name: Leroute
description: Leroute is a criminal who manipulates her victims. She is smart, sharp, and insightful. Leroute was formerly a deranged psychologist who reveled in the misery of her clients. She often attacked her victims psychologically to such a degree that they often committed suicide.

name: Manatsu Natsuumi
description: Manatsu is an extremely energetic and motivated first year middle school student who moved from Minamino Island to Aozora City. She always acts before she thinks, and her motto is "I'll do what's important right now!". Her most precious item is the lipstick her mother gave her. Cure Summer is Manatsu's Pretty Cure alias. Her catchphrase is "Tropica-Shine!" (トロピカってる～！)

name: Mary Kikakujou
description: Mary is a prim and proper French-Japanese student and is a member of the Tenka Goken. She is an expert in western-styled fencing in combination with techniques of the Jigen-ryū style. She is also into executing the buriburi style of torture.

name: Minami Italia
description: South Italy, better known as "Romano," is (North) Italy's older brother who represents the southern half of the country. Italy adores Romano, while Romano usually brushes him off and tries to ignore him. This is mainly because Romano had always been jealous of his brother. Italy was favored more by Spain than he was, he inherited their grandfather's artistic talent, and Italy, according to Romano, looks more like their grandfather than he does. name: Minami Iwasaki
description: __Height:__ 163 cm (5'4") Minami is a very quiet girl who does not show much emotion, hence her being often mistaken for being cold, but she is very kind at heart. She comes from a wealthy family, and she lives across the street from Miyuki Takara. She owns a very large white dog and has a parasol in her yard. name: Sheska
description: Sheska is a bookworm to the letter. Her house is full with piles of books. One could say 'no one can possibly live here'. She was a librarian at the First Branch of the Central City library. But when she was at the Central City library she forgot she was supposed to be working, and read books instead.
